heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for rule of construction and judicial review of the Settlement and Los Alamos Agreements, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 109–286, § 15120 Stat. 1229Sept. 27, 2006
